titleStmt.title: SII 26.292: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 292. (A.R. No. 277 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sandhyā lamp and three paḻaṅkāśu for it by Koṟṟaṅ-Koṟṟaṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ Tulaiyādaśelvaṉ alias Aṉanta- paṉmaṉ of Piḷḷaippākkam alias Kaitava-Kaitavanallūr in Māgaṇūr-nāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam, in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, to the same deity of the same place as occurring in No. 291 above. The money of three kāśu was accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇa who had the right of worship in the temple, named Āḻvāṉ Dēvargaḷ Sundaran alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja-[gōtra].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīirājairājadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 10 8 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu
cceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu tirukkaccūrāṉa nittavinotanallūr Uṭaiyār tiruvā
likkoyiluṭaiyāṟku Immaṇṭalattuc ceṅkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu mākaṇūr
nāṭṭup piḷḷaippākkamāṉa kaiytavakaiytavanallūr koṟṟaṅkoṟṟaṉ ti
ruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ tulaiyāta celvaṉāṉa Aṉantapaṉmaṉ vaitta cantiviḷak
ku 1 Oṉṟukkum Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇaṉ bhāradvāji Āḻvāṉ tevar
kaḷcuntaranāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 3 Ikkācu muṉṟu
Erikkak kaṭaveṉākavu
ṉak kuṭutteṉ tevarkaḷcuntaranāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭeṉ Itu panmāheśvara
rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
